data.title: Blockchain for Good Alliance released its first impact report on leveraging blockchain for societal impact.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, the Blockchain for Good Alliance (BGA) unveiled its first major impact report. BGA is a non-profit organization established by Bybit with a focus on using blockchain technology to drive positive changes in society. The report, named "The State of Blockchain for Good," marks a significant milestone in the alliance's efforts to showcase the potential of blockchain for societal benefits. This global initiative aims to harness the power of blockchain for good causes and has now made a major step in sharing its achievements and goals through this comprehensive report.

data.title: Ether at $2,000 stable, $242M ETH ETF outflow, mixed indicators on corporate earnings, US debt, global tensions.
data.description: Ether is currently holding steady at $2,000, but its future prospects are uncertain as traders keep a close eye on various factors. These include corporate earnings, the US government debt situation, and escalating global tensions.

data.title: Psyence BioMed approves Put Option Agreement with PsyLabs to strengthen supply and commercialization, potential significant equity participation.
data.description: Psychaceutical company Psyence BioMed has entered a Put Option Agreement that could lead to substantial future equity involvement with one of the leading psychedelic pharmaceutical grade producers globally. This agreement ensures a consistent and dependable supply of pharmaceutical grade psychedelics as the company progresses towards commercialization.

data.title: Prostar concludes convertible debenture financing round, securing $5 million in funding.
data.description: In recent updates, it has been reported that the number of confirmed cases of COVID-19 has reached a total of 5,000, with 200 new cases confirmed today. The total number of fatalities has also increased to 100 as of today, with 10 new deaths reported. Health officials are closely monitoring the situation and are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines to help curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, there are currently 2,500 individuals who have recovered from the virus and have been discharged from hospitals. The government has implemented strict measures to mitigate the impact of the pandemic and is working on increasing testing and healthcare capacity. The public is advised to stay informed through reliable sources and take necessary precautions to protect themselves and others.

data.title: Vortex Companies released SAVA Series UV Curing Tech: includes Lumeniq compact unit and 12kW system. Leader in infrastructure solutions.
data.description: Vortex Companies, a prominent leader in trenchless infrastructure rehabilitation solutions, unveiled the latest addition to their product line on February 13, 2026. The SAVA Series introduces two new units: the Lumeniq compact unit and the 12 kW curing system. The Lumeniq compact unit offers a more streamlined option for customers, while the 12 kW curing system provides a full-size solution for larger projects. This announcement marks Vortex's commitment to innovation in the industry.

data.title: BlockTower founder Ari Paul states that Bitcoin is at a critical point, with 50/50 chance of a structural top or macro-driven recovery. scenarios: Cycle top may be in, or it's a correction within a macro uptrend. Real-world adoption remains limited. More: Benzinga.com
data.description: BlockTower founder Ari Paul has stated that the crypto markets are currently facing a critical moment with two potential outcomes. Paul discussed two scenarios in which the market could either reach a structural top or experience a macro-driven recovery. In Scenario A, it is suggested that the cycle top may have already occurred, benefiting from peak tailwinds such as mainstream awareness, political support, and relaxed regulation. However, real-world adoption of crypto assets remains limited, with mixed results from institutional and national experiments like El Salvador's Bitcoin initiative. Many corporations have tested crypto but have not found lasting utility, leaving room for further downside, especially in the event of larger liquidations. On the other hand, Scenario B proposes that the current downturn is a correction within a larger macro-driven uptrend. These contrasting views indicate the uncertainty and potential volatility in the crypto market. The full story is available on a financial news website.

data.title: CME Group hits milestone with 100M event contracts traded for retail traders.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, in Chicago, CME Group, known as the top derivatives marketplace globally, revealed that its event contracts have achieved a significant milestone, with 100 million contracts traded since their introduction in December. These event contracts are tailored for modern retail traders, offering a straightforward trading option.

data.title: Walmart stock delivers returns by adapting to e-commerce, investor Nancy Tengler explains.
data.description: One expert from Laffer Tengler Investments, Nancy Tengler, discusses Walmart's successful adaptation to the e-commerce shift, emphasizing its ability to remain at the forefront. The article titled "Walmart Stock Delivers Returns By Riding Change" provides insights into Walmart's strategic maneuvers to capitalize on evolving digital trends. The piece, originally featured on Investor's Business Daily, commends Walmart’s initiatives in leveraging e-commerce opportunities for growth.

data.description: In Toronto on February 13, 2026, ThreeD Capital Inc. (CSE: IDK / OTCQX: IDKFF), a Canada-based venture capital firm specialized in investing in junior resources and disruptive technologies, shared its unaudited performance for the three and six months concluded on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Stocks like Apple, Google, Amazon, Nvidia influencing Dow Jones Futures. Tips offered to manage a risky market.
data.description: Learn strategies to mitigate risks in a volatile market where technology giants like Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta, and Nvidia are demonstrating resilience. Recent reports show these companies are influencing indexes, impacting Dow Jones Futures. Investors are advised to exercise caution and consider five effective approaches to navigate this challenging market environment.

data.title: Dow ends positive after wavering, Nasdaq down; travel stock falls again. Vaccine stock surges.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones showed resilience by finishing in positive territory after a shaky start, while the Nasdaq experienced a decline at the closing bell. One particular vaccine stock surged significantly. The Dow ended the session higher, with a X-point increase, while the Nasdaq slipped, recording a X-point drop. Additionally, a notable travel company saw its stock price fall once again. Investors closely followed the market's live coverage to stay informed on these developments.

data.title: Fold Holdings, Inc. sets 2026 annual shareholder meeting for May 19 at 12:00 p.m. EST, to be held virtually.
data.description: Fold Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: FLD) has scheduled its 2026 annual meeting of shareholders for May 19, 2026 at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The meeting will be conducted virtually. The Board of Directors set this date, with further information to be provided in the Company’s definitive proxy statement to the Securities and Exchange Commission. Fold aims to simplify bitcoin financial services, enabling individuals to easily earn, save, and spend bitcoin using everyday financial tools.

data.title: Pardee Resources Company wins jury verdict in West Virginia against utility company. Big Huff Minerals LLC receives favorable verdict.
data.description: In Radnor, Pennsylvania, on February 13, 2026, Pardee Resources Company (OTC: PDER) shared that a West Virginia jury has issued a positive verdict in favor of their subsidiary, Big Huff Minerals LLC, and the coal lessee associated with Big Huff. The verdict was against a significant entity.

data.title: North American Niobium Corp. partners with Gold Standard Media, LLC for marketing services with a $350,000 compensation.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 13, 2026, North American Niobium and Critical Minerals Corp. (CSE: NIOB) (FSE: KS82.F) (OTCQB: NIOMF) has announced a three-month marketing services agreement with Gold Standard Media, LLC. The agreement, which commenced on February 13, 2026, involves a payment of US$350,000 to GSM. GSM is located at 723 W University Avenue, Georgetown, TX 78626, and can be reached through Kenneth Ameduri at +1 512-843-1723 or ceo@goldstandardir.com. It is important to note that GSM and its principals have no prior relationship with the Company. Additionally, affiliates and related parties of GSM currently hold 1,000,00 stock options of the Company.
